title: Design Science Research Framework
description: Version 1.0.1 packages the DSR Framework v1 stable line with an explicit scope-boundary clarification for GitHub-native DSR operationalization. The framework remains an L4 reusable-stable artifact package for planning, documenting, evaluating, reviewing, and publishing Design Science Research artifacts and artifact packages. Non-code framework content is dedicated under CC0-1.0 Universal to maximize reuse, indexing, adaptation, translation, redistribution, and public benefit. This release does not claim L5 archival/publication-ready status.
notes: Generated framework files only. No source PDFs or copyrighted source documents are included. Internal audit files and unmapped generated archives are excluded from the public package. v1.0.1 does not claim L5 archival/publication-ready status.
